sections.heading: Reproduction Tools
sections.guide: How to trigger a bug: test runner command, dev server, REPL, minimal script. Include exact CLI invocations. Source: stack CLI docs, exemplar repo README/scripts.

sections.heading: Environment Checks
sections.guide: Runtime version check, package manager, virtual env, cache directories to clear. What to check when a bug can't be reproduced. Source: stack 'getting started' / 'troubleshooting' docs.

sections.heading: Common Bug Patterns
sections.guide: 5-8 ecosystem-specific runtime bugs. For each: **bold name** — symptom, root cause, fix. Source: stack docs 'gotchas'/'pitfalls' sections, exemplar repo issue trackers.

sections.heading: Verification Commands
sections.guide: Exact CLI for type-checker, linter, formatter. What to run after a fix to confirm nothing else broke. Source: detected from exemplar repo config files.

sections.heading: Framework Detection
sections.guide: How to identify which test framework the project uses. List signals: config files, deps, file naming patterns. Source: exemplar repo devDependencies and test directories.

sections.heading: Framework-Specific Test Patterns
sections.guide: What to test and how, specific to this stack's frameworks. API endpoint testing, component testing, data layer testing — with the actual libraries and assertion patterns. Source: stack testing docs, exemplar test files.

sections.heading: Mocking Tools
sections.guide: Which mocking/stubbing libraries to use and when. Boundary mocking patterns specific to this ecosystem (HTTP, DB, clock, filesystem). Source: stack testing docs, exemplar test files.

sections.heading: Signature Examples
sections.guide: Show a typed function signature in this stack's language as the example for the 'write the signature first' step. Source: stack type system docs.

sections.heading: Validation Libraries
sections.guide: Which runtime validation libraries to use at boundaries (equivalent of Zod/Pydantic/Ecto.Changeset for this stack). Source: stack docs, exemplar repo dependencies.

sections.heading: Verification Commands
sections.guide: Exact CLI for type-checker, linter, formatter, test runner. What to run after each refactoring step to confirm nothing broke. Source: detected from exemplar repo config files.

sections.heading: Verification Commands
sections.guide: Exact type-check, lint, test, build commands to run during self-review. Source: detected from exemplar repo config files and package scripts.

sections.heading: Stack-Specific Review Patterns
sections.guide: Common issues to check for in this ecosystem: framework-specific anti-patterns, type system bypasses, security sinks, performance pitfalls. Source: stack linter rule lists, common anti-patterns from docs.
